product_overview: Employee Manager Application is a web app for logging in, viewing an employee directory, and managing employee records through add, edit, delete, and details dialogs. It also includes real-time employee search, navigation, and a dark/light theme toggle.
core_goals: Log in to access the employee management area
View a list of employees in a table
Search employees by name, email, or position
View, edit, and delete existing employee records
Toggle between light and dark themes

features.name: User Login
features.description: Lets a user authenticate with a username and password and enter the employee management area.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill in the Username field -> Fill in the Password field -> Submit the login form -> See the employee list page
Navigate to /login -> Fill in invalid credentials -> Submit the login form -> See an error message

features.name: User Logout
features.description: Lets a signed-in user end the current session and return to the login page.

features.name: View Employee List
features.description: Shows a table of all employees with key details and row-level actions.
user_flows: Navigate to /list -> Wait for the employee table to load -> View all employees in the table

features.name: Search Employees
features.description: Filters the employee list in real time based on typed search text.
user_flows: Navigate to /list -> Type a search term -> See the employee table filter to matching employees
Navigate to /list -> Type a search term with no matches -> See a no employees found message

features.name: Add Employee
features.description: Allows a user to create a new employee from the list modal or the dedicated form page.
user_flows: Navigate to /list -> Open the add employee dialog -> Fill in the name, email, and position fields -> Submit the form -> See a success message -> See the new employee appear in the list
Navigate to /form -> Fill in the name, email, and position fields -> Submit the form -> See a success message -> See /list

features.name: View Employee Details
features.description: Opens a dialog with full details for a selected employee.
user_flows: Navigate to /list -> Open an employee's details -> See the employee ID, name, email, and position -> Close the details dialog

features.name: Edit Employee
features.description: Lets a user update an existing employee record from a pre-filled form.
user_flows: Navigate to /list -> Open an employee for editing -> See the form pre-filled with current employee data -> Change the name, email, or position -> Submit the update -> See a success message -> See the updated employee in the list

features.name: Delete Employee
features.description: Lets a user remove an employee after confirming the deletion.
user_flows: Navigate to /list -> Start deleting an employee -> See a confirmation dialog -> Confirm the deletion -> See a success notification -> See the employee removed from the list
Navigate to /list -> Start deleting an employee -> See a confirmation dialog -> Cancel the deletion -> Return to the list without removing the employee

features.name: Dark/Light Theme Toggle
features.description: Switches the application appearance between light and dark modes.
user_flows: Navigate to /list -> Toggle the theme mode -> See the interface switch between light and dark

routes.description: User login page with username and password fields
Standalone page to add a new employee
Employee list page with search, view, edit, delete, and add (modal) functionality
Root route redirects to /list if logged in, else to /login

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate with username and password. Valid credentials are admin/password, user/123456, test/test123. On success, sets loggedIn and username in localStorage and redirects to /list.
user_interactions: Fill the Username input field
Fill the Password input field
Click the Login button to submit
See error message on invalid credentials
Get redirected to /list on successful login

features.name: User Logout
features.description: Clicking Logoff in the navigation bar removes loggedIn from localStorage and redirects to /login.
user_interactions: Click the Logoff button in the AppBar
Get redirected to /login page

features.name: View Employee List
features.description: Displays a table of all employees fetched from the backend with columns ID, Name, Email, Position, and Actions.
user_interactions: View table of all employees
See loading state while data is fetched
See error alert if fetch fails

features.name: Search Employees
features.description: Filter the employee table in real-time by typing in the search field. Matches against name, email, and position fields.
user_interactions: Type in the Search employees text field
Table filters to show only matching employees
See "No employees found." when no match

features.name: Add Employee (Modal)
features.description: Open a dialog modal from the Employee List page to add a new employee with name, email, and position fields.
user_interactions: Click the "+ Add Employee" button
Fill in Name, Email, and Position fields in the modal
Click Add Employee button to submit
See success alert on creation
See error alert if required fields are missing or request fails
Modal closes and list refreshes after success

features.name: Add Employee (Standalone Page)
features.description: Standalone page at /form to add a new employee.
user_interactions: Navigate to /form via Add Employee nav link
Fill in Name, Email, and Position fields
Click Add Employee button
See success alert and get redirected to /list

features.name: View Employee Details
features.description: Click View on any employee row to open a dialog showing their ID, Name, Email, and Position.
user_interactions: Click the View button on an employee row
See employee details dialog with ID, Name, Email, Position
Click Close to dismiss the dialog

features.name: Edit Employee
features.description: Click Edit on any employee row to open an edit dialog pre-filled with the employee's current data. Submit updates the employee record.
user_interactions: Click the Edit button on an employee row
See pre-filled form in dialog with current employee data
Modify Name, Email, or Position fields
Click Update Employee button to submit
See success alert on update
Dialog closes and list refreshes

features.name: Delete Employee
features.description: Click Delete on any employee row to open a confirmation dialog. Confirm to permanently delete the employee.
user_interactions: Click the Delete button on an employee row
See confirmation dialog with employee name
Click Delete button to confirm
See success snackbar notification
Employee is removed from the list
Click Cancel to dismiss without deleting

features.name: Dark/Light Theme Toggle
features.description: Toggle between light and dark mode using the icon button in the AppBar.
user_interactions: Click the theme toggle icon button in the AppBar
UI switches between light and dark mode

known_limitations.issue: Authentication uses hardcoded credentials in the backend (no database-backed user management)
known_limitations.impact: Only admin/password, user/123456, and test/test123 are valid credentials

known_limitations.issue: No JWT or session tokens; auth state stored only in localStorage
known_limitations.impact: Auth can be bypassed by manually setting localStorage.loggedIn = 'true'
